vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix ipv6 address parsing bug
vllm.author: liiliiliil
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In a pure IPv6 environment, the get_distributed_init_method function in vllm/utils.py returns a URL such as "tcp://2001:4860:4860::8888:8086", where "2001:4860:4860::8888" is the IP address. This format leads to an error when urllib.parse.urlparse attempts to parse the URL and extract the port numbe
